framework: VitePress (Jekyll SEO meta in served HTML is an artifact of GitHub Pages legacy build wrapper; actual build is `bun run docs:build` from package.json)
notes: Pages API: status=built, build_type=legacy, source branch=main path=/, https_enforced=true, public=true. Workflow .github/workflows/pages.yml: triggered on push to main, builds with bun + `bun run docs:build`, uploads artifact docs/.vitepress/dist via actions/upload-pages-artifact, deploys via actions/deploy-pages to github-pages env. Index at dist/index.html returns HTTP 200; served HTML page <h1> is 'Helios Benchmark Harness'. Repo is archived (409 on /pages/builds/latest). Cname=null, custom_404=false.
